mechanism_narrative: A flat or falling FEDFUNDS path keeps discount rates contained and supports equity valuation multiples, so S&P 500 returns turn positive over the next month when policy rates are not rising.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not above baseline when FEDFUNDS is unchanged or lower, or if the signal shows no positive lift in any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL acceleration above a low-inflation threshold forces the market to price earlier monetary tightening, raising real yields and compressing equity multiples, which lowers S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above 2.5% while FEDFUNDS is below 3.0%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances do not show negative 5-day forward returns versus baseline, or if returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered events.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE trend marks weakening labor income and higher recession risk, so equities underperform over the next month as earnings expectations are revised down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not materially lower after UNRATE rises 0.3pp in 3 months, or if PAYEMS deterioration does not strengthen the effect.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth turns negative while UNRATE is already low, the market treats the labor market as peaking before recession, which should weaken S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change turns negative and UNRATE is below 4.5%
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward returns are not negative in the triggered late-cycle subset, or if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE condition adds no predictive power over either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in RSAFS indicates weakening final demand and softer corporate revenue growth, which should push S&P 500 returns lower over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with falling RSAFS do not produce below-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if the effect disappears after controlling for recent CPIAUCSL and UNRATE moves.

mechanism_narrative: When HOUST breaks down sharply, it signals rate-sensitive domestic demand is weakening and cyclicals should lead the market lower over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 8% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is above 1.5%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes do not underperform over 60 trading days, or if the signal is absent when housing weakens outside a tightening-linked regime.

mechanism_narrative: A rising INDPRO trend captures improving production and operating leverage, which supports near-term earnings expectations and lifts S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum fails to produce higher 5-day SPX returns than baseline, or if the sign flips negative in more than one rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: If INDPRO rises while CPIAUCSL stays contained, the economy is expanding without an inflation shock, so real activity improves and S&P 500 returns should be positive over the next month.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is positive and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation stays below 2.5%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint growth-without-inflation condition does not outperform baseline on 20-day returns, or if inflation containment does not materially improve the signal relative to INDPRO alone.
